raw.title: Crazy Town: Episode 125. The Lighter Side of Dark Ages with Chris Smaje
raw.excerpt: Chris Smaje visits Crazy Town for some farmer-to-farmer straight talk. We cover Viking raids to agrarian populism, from societal collapse to the practicalities of making your way in a failed state. And they can’t get away from the shop talk of gardens, livestock, and home economics.

llm_processed.summary: This conversation with Chris Smaje explores how communities can move from an unsustainable economy to a more self-sufficient one.
llm_processed.lateral_potential: This topic often sparks discussions on decentralized systems, village-living, and rural economies.
